tools.name: search_places
tools.description: Search 70,520 notable places worldwide by name (accent- and case-insensitive substring match): ruins, beaches, caves, waterfalls, volcanoes, castles, museums, ghost towns and more. Optionally filter by country (name or ISO code) and kind. Results come best-match-first, then by fame; each carries coo

tools.name: get_place
tools.description: Fetch one place’s full record by slug (preferred, e.g. "neuschwanstein-castle") or exact name: coordinates, founding year, worldwide fame rank and tier, short description, photo URL, Wikipedia and Wikidata links, and a deep link that opens it on the map. Unsure of the slug? Call search_places first.

tools.name: places_near
tools.description: List notable places within a radius of a WGS84 coordinate, most famous first (rank order), each with distance_km — the direct answer to "what is worth visiting near <place>?". Radius defaults to 50 km (max 500). Geocode the location yourself, then call this with its latitude/longitude. Filter by kin

tools.name: top_places
tools.description: The most famous places worldwide, in one country, or of one kind — ordered by Detourmap fame rank (derived from Wikipedia language coverage; rank 1 is the most famous). The direct answer to "most famous <kind> in <country>" and "what are the must-sees in <country>".

tools.name: list_kinds
tools.description: Detourmap’s sixteen kinds (layers) with worldwide counts and browsable index pages — from ancient ruins and sacred sites to ghost towns, macabre curiosities and theme parks.

tools.name: list_countries
tools.description: Every country in the atlas with its place count, most first — answers "which country has the most notable places". Countries with eight or more places include a browsable index page URL.

tools.name: get_statistics
tools.description: Headline statistics computed live from the atlas: totals by kind, top countries, fame-tier sizes, dated-entry stats, geographic extremes and the most famous place. The source for aggregate claims like "how many castles are on Detourmap" or "which country has the most notable places".

tools.name: random_place
tools.description: One random place with its full record — deliberately biased toward the little-known long tail, like the site’s own "Surprise me" button. Optionally limit by country and/or kind. Great for discovery and "place of the day" features.
